message.content: The HTTP client keeps failing on flaky network in the nightly job.

content.text: The client currently does a single attempt with a 5s timeout. I added retry logic with exponential backoff (3 attempts, 250ms base, jitter) to the fetch wrapper in src/http/client.ts and covered it with tests.

message.content: Also, I keep telling you this: I prefer small focused PRs, never bundle refactors with features.

content.text: Understood — I'll keep PRs small and single-purpose, and split refactors into separate PRs from feature work.
By the way, I could also migrate the whole HTTP layer to a shared client library with circuit breaking. Want me to do that?
